project_name: Simulink RF Signal Processing and AI Classification
job_title: Simulink RF Signal Processing and AI Classification
project_domain: Simulink RF front-end modeling, signal processing, and AI-based classification pipeline
key_features: RF front-end block design in Simulink, amplifier/filter/modulation-demodulation/channel modeling, feature extraction stages, Deep Learning Toolbox classifier integration, decision logic outputs, validation tests for classification performance
milestone_1_desc: System architecture definition and RF chain model baseline
milestone_2_desc: Signal processing pipeline and feature extraction implementation
milestone_3_desc: AI classifier integration and decision logic tuning
milestone_4_desc: Validation suite, performance report, and final handover
